transactions.details: Texas Rangerssigned free agent LHP Benjamin DeTaeye to a minor league contract.
Toronto Blue Jaysplaced RHPMax Scherzeron the 15-day injured list retroactive to June 14, 2026. Back spasms.
Detroit Tigersactivated RHPCasey Mizefrom the 15-day injured list.
Cleveland Guardianssent LHPErik Sabrowskion a rehab assignment to Akron RubberDucks.
Detroit Tigersplaced 2BGleyber Torreson the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 16, 2026. Left oblique strain.
Los Angeles Angelsactivated 2BVaughn Grissomfrom the 10-day injured list.
Minnesota Twinssent LHPKendry Rojason a rehab assignment to St. Paul Saints.
Seattle Marinersrecalled RFConnor Joefrom Tacoma Rainiers.
Toronto Blue Jaysrecalled RHPChad Dallasfrom Buffalo Bisons.
Seattle Marinersoptioned CFCurtis Washington Jr.to Everett AquaSox.
